home_about_p1_after: . I'm experienced in React/Svelte and TypeScript, but I'm always learning new things. For me programming isn't just a career, it's been a lifelong hobby.
home_about_p2: I attend development-related meetups and conferences, listen to development podcasts, and I am always keen to try new things, which got me hooked on React and Svelte early.
home_about_p3: I'm an American 🇺🇸 and Canadian 🇨🇦 citizen, but currently I call Sweden 🇸🇪 my home.
home_about_p4: I'm a strong believer in long periods of undistracted "deep work" to get things done. I speak English natively, and I speak Japanese 🇯🇵 and Swedish 🇸🇪 at conversational fluency.
home_skills_frameworks_tools_list: React, Svelte, SvelteKit, Drizzle, tRPC, SQL, GraphQL, Node, Webpack, Git, Vite, Unix, PWAs
work_project_1_detail_1: Gave a talk at the first in-person Svelte Summit in fall 2022 about partial hydration to improve performance in e-commerce sites.
work_project_2_detail_1: Fast, responsive, and stylish e-commerce site built with cutting-edge web technology.
work_project_2_detail_2: Handled localization, internationalization, geo-IP redirect, currency formatting, SEO, Google Tag Manager, and Google Analytics.
work_project_3_detail_1: Developed a re-stylable template used by one UI library with server-side rendering, analytics, and many other features used by one of Sweden’s largest e-commerce providers.
experience_head_subtitle: Roles and responsibilities across my professional career.
exp_1_detail_1: Worked across the stack, fully owning and delivering several critical features including report generation with advanced filtering, object generation using LLMs/AI, and cron scheduling.
exp_2_detail_1: Worked on a large React and TypeScript-based subscription billing application with many stakeholders and complicated requirements as the most senior member of the frontend team.
exp_2_detail_2: Introduced automated testing through Playwright, built tools to help other developers work with complicated forms, and consistently shipped critical features to customers.
exp_3_detail_1: Held 1:1s with engineers, interacted directly with customers, and worked with other leadership to quickly deliver work to clients.
exp_3_detail_2: Continued to be heavily involved in development in Svelte and worked on individual stores as well as an overall e-commerce framework for reusability of common patterns.
exp_4_detail_1: E-commerce development primarily in React using server-side rendering, TypeScript, GraphQL, Webpack, and other cutting-edge web technologies.
exp_4_detail_2: Focused on performance, caching, and tooling to deliver lightweight yet fully featured web apps using Svelte.
exp_5_detail_1: Helped build a web application to automate small business legal needs in Canada.
